title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cyient in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
